summary: Tested quiz feature for Web Application Tester Minijob. All 3 quiz API endpoints work correctly. Quiz UI flow works on both desktop and mobile. Admin can see quiz answers in application detail modal. Fixed missing quiz_completed field in ApplicationResponse model.
updated_files: /app/backend/models/application.py - Added quiz_completed and quiz_completed_at fields to ApplicationResponse model
seed_data_creation: Created test applicants for quiz testing via API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quiz feature fully tested. 15 questions across 5 pages (3 per page). Question types: select (Ja/Nein), text input, info (yellow box with confirm button). Quiz appears after application is accepted (status 'Akzeptiert') and before contract signing. After quiz completion, employee sees contract signing page. Admin can view quiz answers in application detail modal under 'Quiz-Antworten' section.

features_tested.POST /api/quiz/submit: PASS - Submits 15 quiz answers, updates application.quiz_completed=true
features_tested.GET /api/quiz/status: PASS - Returns quiz_completed status for authenticated applicant
features_tested.GET /api/quiz/admin/{applicant_id}: PASS - Admin can retrieve all quiz answers
features_tested.quiz_auth_protection: PASS - All endpoints require proper authentication
features_tested.quiz_admin_only: PASS - Admin endpoint returns 403 for non-admin tokens
features_tested.quiz_resubmission: PASS - Quiz can be resubmitted (upsert behavior)
features_tested.quiz_ui_desktop: PASS - 5 pages with 3 questions each, progress bar, navigation buttons
features_tested.quiz_ui_mobile: PASS - Responsive layout works on 390x844 viewport
features_tested.quiz_question_types: PASS - select (Ja/Nein), text input, info (yellow box with confirm)
features_tested.quiz_flow_after_accept: PASS - Quiz shown when status=Akzeptiert and quiz_completed=false
features_tested.quiz_to_contract_transition: PASS - After quiz completion, shows contract signing page
features_tested.admin_quiz_answers_view: PASS - Quiz-Antworten section visible in application detail modal

bug_fixes_applied.ApplicationResponse_model: Added quiz_completed and quiz_completed_at fields to /app/backend/models/application.py so admin panel can see quiz completion status
